'''Tutti Snibit''' was a [[Chadra-Fan/Legends|Chadra-Fan]] [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]], but his small size prevented him from becoming renowned or recruited by important potential employers. Most notably, he was rejected by [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader's]] screening crew in [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]] to become part of the hunt for the passengers of the [[Millennium Falcon/Legends|''Millennium Falcon'']]. Nevertheless, Snibit made a plea to the infamous [[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba Fett]] while still aboard the [[Executor/Legends|''Executor'']] to help the hunter in any way he could. Boba Fett apparently hired Snibit to send the rival [[Trandoshan/Legends|Trandoshan]] hunter [[Bossk/Legends|Bossk]] off in a direction away from [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] and [[Chewbacca/Legends|Chewbacca]]. As part of this plan, Snibit in turn introduced the hunters [[Tinian I'att Azur-Jamin|Tinian I'att]] and [[Chenlambec]] to Bossk for 210 [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|Imperial credits]], a small reward compared to what he would be making from Fett.
